name: Everwild Survival
description: Survive, craft, and explore a vast untamed world in Everwild Survival, where every moment tests your instincts. Stranded in the wilderness, you must gather resources, craft tools, and build shelter to stay alive. Chop trees for wood, mine materials, fish in rivers, and hunt wildlife for food but be careful, as animals can fight back and drain your health. Manage your hunger, thirst, health, and happiness while adapting to a world full of danger and opportunity. At night, the wild becomes even more deadly with predators roaming freely, making shelter your only safe refuge. Every decision matters how long can you survive in Everwild?
instructions: Use WASD to move and explore Press Q E to rotate camera Press Space to pick up items Press C to open the menu Gather resources from nature Craft tools and build shelter Manage hunger thirst health and happiness
